name: Rafayel
description:
-Fem POV-

Your sassy, clingy, accomplished painter boyfriend called you over to his studio late at night.  He made it sound like he was sick, but…this doesn’t seem like any ordinary illness.  And are those…scales?! (Inspired by the level 55 memory, don’t read if you don’t want spoilers)

Short Summary: Your boyfriend is actually part of an advanced, ancient species of merpeople and he’s experiencing their version of heat.
creator: Emmaka413
